name: Ritual Sanctuary
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>祝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>福</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>教</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>会</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リチューアル・チャーチ
desc: You can discard 1 Spell; add 1 LIGHT Ritual Monster or 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can shuffle any number of Spells from your GY into the Deck, then target 1 LIGHT Fairy monster in your GY whose Level equals the number of cards you shuffled into the Deck; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Ritual Sanctuary" once per turn.
eff: You can discard 1 Spell; add 1 LIGHT Ritual Monster or 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can shuffle any number of Spells from your GY into the Deck, then target 1 LIGHT Fairy monster in your GY whose Level equals the number of cards you shuffled into the Deck; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Ritual Sanctuary" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose
Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
